```{=typst}
#pagebreak()
#wcg-ws-open(
  day: "Day 3", num: 3, title: "Trigger map",
  purpose: "To map the situation around one purchase, so you can see what shapes it.",
  how: [Think of one recent purchase. Instead of asking "why did I do that,"
  describe what was happening around you. The situation is often the real driver.],
)

#wcg-panel(title: "Worked example")[
  *Place:* On the sofa. *Time:* Evening. *With whom:* Alone. \
  *Feeling:* Bored. *Cue:* Phone notification for a sale. \
  *Easiest thing to change:* Keep the phone in another room after dinner.
]

#wcg-field("Where I was (place)", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("Time of day", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("Who I was with", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("How I was feeling", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("The cue or trigger (what set it off)", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("The part that would be easiest to change", lines: 1)

```

> **A gentle reminder.**
>
> Triggers are information, not faults. Everyone has them.

```{=typst}
#wcg-ws-footer()
```
